summary: Add 'events tour <attraction>' view that filters local events by attractionId or name (case-insensitive substring), projects city/venue/status, and flags rows where on-sale is within --on-sale-window days.
reason: Persona B workflow (tour-chasing fan). Joins local events × attractions; parses dates.status.code + sales.public.startDateTime — fields documented in the brief's Codebase Intelligence section.
validated_outcome: --help pass; on-sale window math computed against time.Now().
